TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Balung ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 82 buwan, 225 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 165 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 60 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 70%, Amis 1%, Truku 0.4%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhiyal Balung qani ga cyux maki ska na 'bu Balung ru ska na qphay, rhiyal qalang Balung ga mkura sa htgan wagi ga Girang, htagan wagi ga Sincik , tekura sa te kraya ga Mnka, mkura sa tkayahu ga Taychu maki ska na qalang Gogan ga 'bu Balung qu wagiq balay. sinngya'an kayal rhiyal na qalang 'bu Balung ga maki sa wagiq na rhiyal nanu yasa tngugan abaw ru 'bagan hrhul kayal nya, qmisan lga cingay qwalax ru mnlaqiy uzi. lingay na qalang ga cyux uzi qu gong, te 'law ga gong qara te 'zil ga gong tamang, te qyahu nya lga cyux msqun sa llyung mintura. . sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 sraral bnkis na Tayal mnwah muyaw rhiyal rayax. tehuk rhiyal Balung lga tkan nha cingay balay qthuy hopa na qhoniq nyux mtgayaw, nanu yasa qu Balung swon nha qu smlalu qu rhiyal qani la. bnkis na Tayal Kotas Kbuta aring pinsbkan b'nux sbaya, rasun nya squliq 'Tayal tehuk mbzya hbun Gogon, kinlolay maras gluw nha teqsu balay tehuk rhiyal Bsyal , maki kya qu hopa na qalang babaw nya lga mwah Balung la, squliq nya ga kbalung lalu nya. ,祖先Kinlolay 帶領他的子孫到達Bsyal , kbalung. kinhmayan squliq 人口概況 qalang Balung misuw ga kya pitu pgan blihul ngasal ru sazing kbhul mzimal squliq nha. . snhyan部落宗教 qutux sixyaso kyokay cyux maki lingay qalang Balung, piyux balay qu sinya nya. trang mlahuy qu kwara sinya na ga ini kwa'I maki uzi qu kyokay nha. . 'wahan pila經濟與特產 sraral ga squliq na Balung nanak mqumah, tmuya trakis, ngahi, sehuy, ru mlikuy ga musa rrgyax qmalup maras qsinuw qani qu sqyanux Tayal. mwah qu Zipun pcbaq kmihuy slaq tmuya pagay, yasa qu taring ta baq maniq mami papay la. maki 'bu Balung qu Zipun ga tmutu qhoniq qparung rgyax galan txan na Tayal. . Tuqiy 部落交通 sraran balay bnkis ga siy phkani mluw tuqiy na rgyax. kya hazi minkok mzimal msyaw kawas lga aring 'bu Balung tehuk qphay kblayun kwara squliq na Balung aki wahan na glgun ma, bahaw nya lga gmalu qu mrhaw ru kblayun nha hopa na tuqiy wahan hopa na glgun basuru toraku uzi la. squliq na Balung cyux tmuhi cingay na qzimux, trang phpah lga blaq balay ngayan qu phpah nya, nanu piyux balay kmukan mwah mangay. . rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Balung hya' ga 'Bu balung. tay 'zil na Balung hya' ga Qphay. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 部落文健站
S.PHON: alaŋ βaluŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħijal βaluŋ qani ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕka na ʔβu βaluŋ ru s~ɕka na qpħaj, rħijal qalaŋ βaluŋ ɣa mkura s~ɕa ħtɣan waɣi ɣa ɣiraŋ, ħtaɣan waɣi ɣa s~ɕinʦ~ʨik , tekura s~ɕa te kraja ɣa mnka, mkura s~ɕa tkajaħu ɣa tajʦ~ʨħu maki s~ɕka na qalaŋ ɣoɣan ɣa ʔβu βaluŋ qu waɣiq βalaj. s~ɕinŋjaʔan kajal rħijal na qalaŋ ʔβu βaluŋ ɣa maki s~ɕa waɣiq na rħijal nanu jas~ɕa tŋuɣan aβaw ru ʔβaɣan ħrħul kajal nja, qmis~ɕan lɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj qwalax ru mnlaqij uzi. liŋaj na qalaŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux uzi qu ɣoŋ, te ʔlaw ɣa ɣoŋ qara te ʔzil ɣa ɣoŋ tamaŋ, te qjaħu nja lɣa ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕqun s~ɕa lljuŋ mintura. . s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** s~ɕraral βnkis~ɕ na tajal mnwaħ mujaw rħijal rajax. teħuk rħijal βaluŋ lɣa tkan nħa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qtħuj ħopa na qħoniq njux mtɣajaw, nanu jas~ɕa qu βaluŋ s~ɕwon nħa qu s~ɕmlalu qu rħijal qani la. βnkis~ɕ na tajal kotas~ɕ kβuta ariŋ pins~ɕβkan βʔnux s~ɕβaja, ras~ɕun nja s~ɕquliq ʔtajal teħuk mβzja ħβun ɣoɣon, kinlolaj maras~ɕ ɣluw nħa teqs~ɕu βalaj teħuk rħijal βs~ɕjal , maki kja qu ħopa na qalaŋ βaβaw nja lɣa mwaħ βaluŋ la, s~ɕquliq nja ɣa kβaluŋ lalu nja. ,**kinlolaj ********βs~ɕjal , kβaluŋ. kinħmajan s~ɕquliq **** qalaŋ βaluŋ mis~ɕuw ɣa kja pitu pɣan βliħul ŋas~ɕal ru s~ɕaziŋ kβħul mzimal s~ɕquliq nħa. . s~ɕnħjan**** qutux s~ɕixjas~ɕo kjokaj ʦ~ʨjux maki liŋaj qalaŋ βaluŋ, pijux βalaj qu s~ɕinja nja. traŋ mlaħuj qu kwara s~ɕinja na ɣa ini kwaʔi maki uzi qu kjokaj nħa. . ʔwaħan pila***** s~ɕraral ɣa s~ɕquliq na βaluŋ nanak mqumaħ, tmuja trakis~ɕ, ŋaħi, s~ɕeħuj, ru mlikuj ɣa mus~ɕa rrɣjax qmalup maras~ɕ qs~ɕinuw qani qu s~ɕqjanux tajal. mwaħ qu zipun pʦ~ʨβaq kmiħuj s~ɕlaq tmuja paɣaj, jas~ɕa qu tariŋ ta βaq maniq mami papaj la. maki ʔβu βaluŋ qu zipun ɣa tmutu qħoniq qparuŋ rɣjax ɣalan txan na tajal. . tuqij **** s~ɕraran βalaj βnkis~ɕ ɣa s~ɕij pħkani mluw tuqij na rɣjax. kja ħazi minkok mzimal ms~ɕjaw kawas~ɕ lɣa ariŋ ʔβu βaluŋ teħuk qpħaj kβlajun kwara s~ɕquliq na βaluŋ aki waħan na ɣlɣun ma, βaħaw nja lɣa ɣmalu qu mrħaw ru kβlajun nħa ħopa na tuqij waħan ħopa na ɣlɣun βas~ɕuru toraku uzi la. s~ɕquliq na βaluŋ ʦ~ʨjux tmuħi ʦ~ʨiŋaj na qzimux, traŋ pħpaħ lɣa βlaq βalaj ŋajan qu pħpaħ nja, nanu pijux βalaj kmukan mwaħ maŋaj. . rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʔβu βaluŋ. taj ʔzil na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa qpħaj. ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ *****
S.FORM: alang Balung ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 82 buwan, 225 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 165 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 60 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 70%, Amis 1%, Truku 0.4%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhiyal Balung qani ga cyux maki ska na 'bu Balung ru ska na qphay, rhiyal qalang Balung ga mkura sa htgan wagi ga Girang, htagan wagi ga Sincik , tekura sa te kraya ga Mnka, mkura sa tkayahu ga Taychu maki ska na qalang Gogan ga 'bu Balung qu wagiq balay. sinngya'an kayal rhiyal na qalang 'bu Balung ga maki sa wagiq na rhiyal nanu yasa tngugan abaw ru 'bagan hrhul kayal nya, qmisan lga cingay qwalax ru mnlaqiy uzi. lingay na qalang ga cyux uzi qu gong, te 'law ga gong qara te 'zil ga gong tamang, te qyahu nya lga cyux msqun sa llyung mintura. . sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 sraral bnkis na Tayal mnwah muyaw rhiyal rayax. tehuk rhiyal Balung lga tkan nha cingay balay qthuy hopa na qhoniq nyux mtgayaw, nanu yasa qu Balung swon nha qu smlalu qu rhiyal qani la. bnkis na Tayal Kotas Kbuta aring pinsbkan b'nux sbaya, rasun nya squliq 'Tayal tehuk mbzya hbun Gogon, kinlolay maras gluw nha teqsu balay tehuk rhiyal Bsyal , maki kya qu hopa na qalang babaw nya lga mwah Balung la, squliq nya ga kbalung lalu nya. ,祖先Kinlolay 帶領他的子孫到達Bsyal , kbalung. kinhmayan squliq 人口概況 qalang Balung misuw ga kya pitu pgan blihul ngasal ru sazing kbhul mzimal squliq nha. . snhyan部落宗教 qutux sixyaso kyokay cyux maki lingay qalang Balung, piyux balay qu sinya nya. trang mlahuy qu kwara sinya na ga ini kwa'I maki uzi qu kyokay nha. . 'wahan pila經濟與特產 sraral ga squliq na Balung nanak mqumah, tmuya trakis, ngahi, sehuy, ru mlikuy ga musa rrgyax qmalup maras qsinuw qani qu sqyanux Tayal. mwah qu Zipun pcbaq kmihuy slaq tmuya pagay, yasa qu taring ta baq maniq mami papay la. maki 'bu Balung qu Zipun ga tmutu qhoniq qparung rgyax galan txan na Tayal. . Tuqiy 部落交通 sraran balay bnkis ga siy phkani mluw tuqiy na rgyax. kya hazi minkok mzimal msyaw kawas lga aring 'bu Balung tehuk qphay kblayun kwara squliq na Balung aki wahan na glgun ma, bahaw nya lga gmalu qu mrhaw ru kblayun nha hopa na tuqiy wahan hopa na glgun basuru toraku uzi la. squliq na Balung cyux tmuhi cingay na qzimux, trang phpah lga blaq balay ngayan qu phpah nya, nanu piyux balay kmukan mwah mangay. . rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Balung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Balung hya' ga 'Bu balung. tay 'zil na Balung hya' ga Qphay. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 部落文健站
S.PHON: alaŋ βaluŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħijal βaluŋ qani ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕka na ʔβu βaluŋ ru s~ɕka na qpħaj, rħijal qalaŋ βaluŋ ɣa mkura s~ɕa ħtɣan waɣi ɣa ɣiraŋ, ħtaɣan waɣi ɣa s~ɕinʦ~ʨik , tekura s~ɕa te kraja ɣa mnka, mkura s~ɕa tkajaħu ɣa tajʦ~ʨħu maki s~ɕka na qalaŋ ɣoɣan ɣa ʔβu βaluŋ qu waɣiq βalaj. s~ɕinŋjaʔan kajal rħijal na qalaŋ ʔβu βaluŋ ɣa maki s~ɕa waɣiq na rħijal nanu jas~ɕa tŋuɣan aβaw ru ʔβaɣan ħrħul kajal nja, qmis~ɕan lɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj qwalax ru mnlaqij uzi. liŋaj na qalaŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux uzi qu ɣoŋ, te ʔlaw ɣa ɣoŋ qara te ʔzil ɣa ɣoŋ tamaŋ, te qjaħu nja lɣa ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕqun s~ɕa lljuŋ mintura. . s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** s~ɕraral βnkis~ɕ na tajal mnwaħ mujaw rħijal rajax. teħuk rħijal βaluŋ lɣa tkan nħa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qtħuj ħopa na qħoniq njux mtɣajaw, nanu jas~ɕa qu βaluŋ s~ɕwon nħa qu s~ɕmlalu qu rħijal qani la. βnkis~ɕ na tajal kotas~ɕ kβuta ariŋ pins~ɕβkan βʔnux s~ɕβaja, ras~ɕun nja s~ɕquliq ʔtajal teħuk mβzja ħβun ɣoɣon, kinlolaj maras~ɕ ɣluw nħa teqs~ɕu βalaj teħuk rħijal βs~ɕjal , maki kja qu ħopa na qalaŋ βaβaw nja lɣa mwaħ βaluŋ la, s~ɕquliq nja ɣa kβaluŋ lalu nja. ,**kinlolaj ********βs~ɕjal , kβaluŋ. kinħmajan s~ɕquliq **** qalaŋ βaluŋ mis~ɕuw ɣa kja pitu pɣan βliħul ŋas~ɕal ru s~ɕaziŋ kβħul mzimal s~ɕquliq nħa. . s~ɕnħjan**** qutux s~ɕixjas~ɕo kjokaj ʦ~ʨjux maki liŋaj qalaŋ βaluŋ, pijux βalaj qu s~ɕinja nja. traŋ mlaħuj qu kwara s~ɕinja na ɣa ini kwaʔi maki uzi qu kjokaj nħa. . ʔwaħan pila***** s~ɕraral ɣa s~ɕquliq na βaluŋ nanak mqumaħ, tmuja trakis~ɕ, ŋaħi, s~ɕeħuj, ru mlikuj ɣa mus~ɕa rrɣjax qmalup maras~ɕ qs~ɕinuw qani qu s~ɕqjanux tajal. mwaħ qu zipun pʦ~ʨβaq kmiħuj s~ɕlaq tmuja paɣaj, jas~ɕa qu tariŋ ta βaq maniq mami papaj la. maki ʔβu βaluŋ qu zipun ɣa tmutu qħoniq qparuŋ rɣjax ɣalan txan na tajal. . tuqij **** s~ɕraran βalaj βnkis~ɕ ɣa s~ɕij pħkani mluw tuqij na rɣjax. kja ħazi minkok mzimal ms~ɕjaw kawas~ɕ lɣa ariŋ ʔβu βaluŋ teħuk qpħaj kβlajun kwara s~ɕquliq na βaluŋ aki waħan na ɣlɣun ma, βaħaw nja lɣa ɣmalu qu mrħaw ru kβlajun nħa ħopa na tuqij waħan ħopa na ɣlɣun βas~ɕuru toraku uzi la. s~ɕquliq na βaluŋ ʦ~ʨjux tmuħi ʦ~ʨiŋaj na qzimux, traŋ pħpaħ lɣa βlaq βalaj ŋajan qu pħpaħ nja, nanu pijux βalaj kmukan mwaħ maŋaj. . rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʔβu βaluŋ. taj ʔzil na βaluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa qpħaj. ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ *****
